name_en: 👄L New messenger bag👉11360,🎺 Featuring imported pebbled calfskin paired with a soft back leather, adjustable cotton webbing shoulder strap, comfort is greatly increased👍 As a perfect interpretation of the classic messenger bag, it offers functionality while maintaining a minimalist and elegant masculine silhouette. Fold-over top flap closure with double buckle fastening. Novel compact volume, suitable for smart practical style. Main features: Made of soft textured calfskin, webbing shoulder strap, herringbone cotton canvas lining, two internal slip pockets, four rows of patchwork silhouette leather flaps, dimensions: 33*25*10.3cm
